name: Angels on Horseback
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 6 oysters in a round glass casserole dish.
2. Heat uncovered in the microwave for 45 to 60 seconds on High, or just until the shells open slightly. Do not cook the oysters.
3. Repeat with the other 6 oysters.
4. Remove the oysters from their shells.
5. Season with pepper.
6. Place 6 slices of bacon on a roasting rack and set in the glass dish.
7. Cover with paper towel; cook for 2 minutes on High.
8. Repeat with the remaining bacon.
9. Wrap a slice of bacon around each oyster; secure with a toothpick.
10. Place on the rack, cover, and cook for 3 to 4 minutes on High or until the oysters are cooked.
11. Rotate the dish halfway through the cooking time.
12. Serve with lemon slices.
